svg.text: Prefect version: orchestration expressed as typed Python flows
The refactor keeps Rapthor state and operation ordering in Python, while Prefect/Dask schedules named flows, tasks, and leaf commands.

text.tspan: CWL and Jinja are no longer the orchestration language. The runtime graph is visible in Python flow functions,
operation inputs become serializable payloads, task-runner choice is explicit, and external tools remain isolated leaf commands.
